event_data.blessing_text:
May John be free from suffering and the causes of suffering.
May John find happiness and the causes of happiness.
May John never be separated from supreme bliss.
May John abide in equanimity.

With the intention of Healing for John, may all beings benefit.

Om Mani Padme Hum

Om Mani Padme Hum

May Amazon Rainforest be filled with loving-kindness.
May Amazon Rainforest be well.
May Amazon Rainforest be peaceful and at ease.
May Amazon Rainforest be happy.

May Healing and Regeneration for the Amazon Rainforest be fulfilled for the highest good.

May all beings everywhere share in these blessings.
